summary: The implementation successfully addresses both requirements. REQ-1 is satisfied by adding a 'signup' variant to AuthButton that displays a visible sign up option with appropriate icon and text. REQ-2 is fully implemented with sign up buttons added to HomePage (in a dedicated CTA section and header), ResultsPage (as primary authentication option), and Layout header, clearly differentiating between sign in and sign up actions through distinct styling, icons, and text labels.
